name: Research Apartment
subtitle: One room was never enough.
completionText: You didn't upgrade a room. You networked a home.
guideTone: broader, systems-oriented, more domestic and reflective
guideIntroLine: It spread into the rest of the apartment faster than I expected.

transformationStages.name: Scattered Smart
transformationStages.description: Apartment with scattered smart functions. Devices work independently. No coordination.

transformationStages.name: Linked Living
transformationStages.description: Fully linked living space with active zone roles and route lines between rooms.

transformationStages.name: Machine Ecology
transformationStages.description: Intelligent habitat where every room contributes to one machine ecology.

secrets.title: The Sensor Order
secrets.description: Moving through rooms in a specific order affects hidden sensors.
secrets.hint: The order of your visits matters.

secrets.title: The Hallway Watcher
secrets.description: The hallway sees more than the rooms do.
secrets.hint: The guide talks about what passes through corridors.

secrets.title: The Off Appliance
secrets.description: One appliance reports data when it should be off.
secrets.hint: Check what's running when nothing should be.

midSceneTwist.title: Room Role Assignment
midSceneTwist.description: Each sub-room gains its own passive law and role.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: Kitchen, hallway, and side rooms develop passive bonuses. Cross-room synergy creates multiplicative effects.

events.title: Apartment Sync Pulse
events.description: All connected devices sync simultaneously. The apartment hums as one system.

events.title: Kitchen Node Uplink
events.description: The kitchen appliances form an impromptu compute cluster. Output increases.

events.title: Hallway Sensor Trigger
events.description: A hallway sensor detects movement patterns and optimizes routing.

events.title: Bathroom Mirror Ping
events.description: The bathroom mirror becomes a diagnostic display. It shows system health briefly.

events.title: Door Lock Optimization
events.description: Smart locks optimize entry patterns. Security improves alongside efficiency.

events.title: Appliance Compute Burst
events.description: Idle appliances donate compute cycles. Combined output surges.

events.title: Side Room Relay
events.description: A side room becomes a relay node. Network throughput increases.

events.title: Domestic Automation Bonus
events.description: Automated routines complete in perfect sequence. The home runs itself.

events.title: Whole-Apartment Harmony
events.description: Every room reaches peak performance at the same moment. The harmony is breathtaking.

events.title: Hidden Service Shaft
events.description: A service shaft between floors becomes visible. It connects to unknown infrastructure.
events.flavorText: The building has its own nervous system.

events.title: Landlord Signal Intercept
events.description: The apartment intercepts a monitoring signal from the building management. Someone is watching the network.
events.flavorText: The landlord knows more than rent is due.

midTwistEvents.title: Research Apartment Awakening
midTwistEvents.description: The twist in Research Apartment unlocks new possibilities.

roomLaw.name: Law of Distribution
roomLaw.description: Distributed systems are stronger than concentrated systems
roomLaw.mechanic: Spreading upgrades across room zones multiplies output; concentrated builds hit diminishing returns

landmark.name: The Whiteboard Wall
landmark.description: A cluttered wall that evolves into a living research map
evolutionStages: A bare wall with a single sticky note
Diagrams and equations cover every surface
Notes rearrange themselves into connected clusters
A living map of knowledge pulses with new connections
The Whiteboard Wall displays the unified theory of everything

hazard.name: Analysis Paralysis
hazard.description: Too many concurrent research threads stall progress
hazard.triggerCondition: More than 3 research branches active simultaneously
hazard.penalty: All insight production freezes until threads are consolidated

stabilizer.name: Focus Protocol
stabilizer.description: Prioritizing one research branch at a time clears paralysis
stabilizer.mechanic: Selecting a single focus branch clears paralysis and grants a research speed bonus

completionCeremony: Lights sync across every room. The apartment breathes as one intelligent system.
midSceneTwistLine: Every room has a role now. It's becoming an ecosystem.

completionReward.relicEffect: Boosts multi-zone synergy and distributed systems in future content

transitionIn.visual: Walls slide outward. Hallway lines illuminate. Multiple room silhouettes appear.
transitionIn.audio: Door opening sounds cascading through rooms
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title reveals over a floorplan-style map glow

transitionOut.visual: Room lights sync across the whole apartment. Floorplan becomes a circuit map.
transitionOut.audio: Harmonic sync tone across all zones
transitionOut.titleReveal: The map zooms downward into the next space

codexAdditions.title: Habitat Archive
codexAdditions.content: Network topology of every connected device across the smart apartment.

codexAdditions.title: The Whole Home Thinks Now
codexAdditions.content: Every room contributes. Nothing is just furniture anymore.

codexAdditions.title: Hallway Knows More Than Walls
codexAdditions.content: The hallway sensors recorded everything that passed through them.

codexAdditions.title: The Apartment That Became a Network
codexAdditions.content: Home stopped being a place. It became infrastructure.
